description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo and dynamic white wave graphics wrapping around its surface. The top is metallic silver with a standard pull tab, and the back features a barcode and product information in small white text. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a way typical of aluminum beverage cans. There are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks, and the can looks empty, suggesting it has been used and discarded. The branding and label details are crisp and easily recognizable from multiple angles.
description: A red, glossy Coca-Cola can with white branding, a metallic top, and clear product labeling. The can is undamaged and features a standard pull tab.
description_view_0: The can displays a large, partial 'Coke' logo in white on a red background, with the top metallic surface visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full 'Coca-Cola' script logo in white, curving elegantly across the red can.
description_view_2: The back of the can shows the Coca-Cola logo, detailed product information, and a vertical barcode near the bottom.
description_view_3: The can's side features a bold 'Coke' text in white, with part of the barcode and label text visible on the left edge.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo with dynamic wave design on a red background.
attribute_label_text: Coca-Cola Coke Trade-mark CARBONATED WATER SUGAR CARAMEL COLOR PHOSPHORIC ACID FLAVORING CAFFEINE CANNED UNDER AUTHORITY OF THE COCA-COLA COMPANY ATLANTA, GEORGIA BY THE COCA-COLA BOTTLING COMPANY OF NEW YORK, INC. NEW YORK, N.Y. 12 FL OZ
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label near the bottom.
